calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Charles Nunley (949-252-9400) appearing for Defendant and moving party by Court Call/ No other apperances.

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Ameriprise Bank's Motion to Dismiss is Granted. Plaintiff failed to file and amended complaint per November 11, 2011 Order. No opposition field. Prevailing Party to prepare a form of order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: AMERIPRISE BANK'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is continued to August 28, 2013 at 9:30am in Department 501 to provide moving party with an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the operative pleading to Department 501 by 4:00pm on August 14, 2013 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Notice Of Motion To Continue Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: AMERIPRISE'S Motion To Continue Motion To Dismiss is Off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE BANK's Motion on To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is Continued to August 12, 2013. Moving party is ordered again (See CGC-13-529041) to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of Second Amended Complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition. All papers must be delivered to Department 501 no later than July 26, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dimsiss For Failure To Amend Or In The Alternative Dmeurrer To First Amended Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CURTIS H. WARREN, TEL. NO. 568-3631, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE BANK, FSB'S Motion To Dimsiss For Failure To Amend Or In The Alternative Demurrer To First Amended Complaint IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR DUE TO THE FILING OF BANKRUPTCY. CASE IS AUTOMATICALLY STAYED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Demurrer; Req For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charles W. Nunley, Esq., from Malcolm & Cisneros, 949-252-9400 ext. 293, for respondent and moving party, appearing by telephone
Curtis H. Warren, Petitioner in Pro Per (came in late, left no card)

Opposing party did not give notice to the court or to the moving party of his intentions to appear for argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT AMERIPRISE BANK, FSB'S Demurrer is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. Moving party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
